original:
śrī īśvara uvāca
vṛttōtphulla viśālākṣaṃ vipakṣakṣayadīkṣitam
ninādatrastaviśvāṇḍaṃ viṣṇuṃ ugraṃ namāmyaham

sarvairavadhyatāṃ prāptaṃ sabalaughaṃ ditēḥ sutam
nakhāgraiḥ śakalīcakrē yastaṃ vīraṃ namāmyaham

padāvaṣṭabdhapātāḻaṃ mūrdhāviṣṭatriviṣṭapam
bhujapraviṣṭāṣṭadiśaṃ mahāviṣṇuṃ namāmyaham

jyōtīṃṣyarkēndu nakṣatrajvalanādīnyanukramāt
jvalanti tējasā yasya taṃ jvalantaṃ namāmyaham
split_lines: jvalanti | tējasā | yasya | taṃ | jvalantaṃ | namāmyaham

original:
sarvēndriyairapi vinā sarvaṃ sarvatra sarvadā
yō jānāti namāmyādyaṃ tamahaṃ sarvatōmukham

naravat siṃhavaccaiva yasya rūpaṃ mahātmanaḥ
mahāsaṭaṃ mahādaṃṣṭram taṃ nṛsiṃhaṃ namāmyaham

yannāmasmaraṇād bhītāḥ bhūtavētāḻarākṣasāḥ
rōgādyāśca praṇaśyanti bhīṣaṇaṃ taṃ namāmyaham

sarvō’pi yaṃ samāśritya sakalaṃ bhadramaśnutē
śriyā ca bhadrayā juṣṭaḥ yastaṃ bhadraṃ namāmyaham
split_lines: śriyā | ca | bhadrayā | juṣṭaḥ | yastaṃ | bhadraṃ | namāmyaham

original:
śrī mantrarājapadastōtram
sākṣāt svakālē saṃprāptaṃ mṛtyuṃ śatrugaṇānvitam
bhaktānāṃ nāśayēd yastu mṛtyumṛtyuṃ namāmyaham

namaskārātmakaṃ yasmai vidhāyā’’tmanivēdanam
tyaktaduḥkhō’khilān kāmān aśnantaṃ taṃ namāmyaham

dāsabhūtāḥ svatassarvē hyātmānaḥ paramātmanaḥ
atō’hamapi tē dāsaḥ iti matvā namāmyaham
split_lines: atō’hamapi | tē | dāsaḥ | iti | matvā | namāmyaham

original:
śaṅkarēṇā’’darāt prōktaṃ padānāṃ tattvanirṇayam
trisandhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhēt tasya śrīrvidyā’’yuśca vardhatē
split_lines: trisandhyaṃ | yaḥ | paṭhēt | tasya | śrīrvidyā’’yuśca | vardhatē

title: Dōhā 1
original:
śrī guru charaṇa sarōja raja nijamana mukura sudhāri ।
varaṇau raghuvara vimalayaśa jō dāyaka phalachāri ॥
buddhihīna tanujānikai sumirau pavana kumāra ।
bala buddhi vidyā dēhu mōhi harahu kalēśa vikāra ॥
split_lines: śrī guru charaṇa sarōja raja nijamana mukura sudhāri
varaṇau raghuvara vimalayaśa jō dāyaka phalachāri
bala buddhi vidyā dēhu mōhi harahu kalēśa vikāra

title: Dhyānam 2
original:
atulita baladhāmaṃ svarṇa śailābha dēham ।
danuja vana kṛśānuṃ jñāninā magragaṇyam ॥
sakala guṇa nidhānaṃ vānarāṇā madhīśam ।
raghupati priya bhaktaṃ vātajātaṃ namāmi ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
gōṣpadīkṛta vārāśiṃ maśakīkṛta rākṣasam ।
rāmāyaṇa mahāmālā ratnaṃ vandē-(a)nilātmajam ॥
yatra yatra raghunātha kīrtanaṃ tatra tatra kṛtamastakāñjalim ।
bhāṣpavāri paripūrṇa lōchanaṃ mārutiṃ namata rākṣasāntakam ॥
split_lines: yatra yatra raghunātha kīrtanaṃ tatra tatra kṛtamastakāñjalim
bhāṣpavāri paripūrṇa lōchanaṃ mārutiṃ namata rākṣasāntakam

title: Verse 4
original:
manōjavaṃ māruta tulyavēgam ।
jitēndriyaṃ buddhi matāṃ variṣṭam ॥
vātātmajaṃ vānarayūtha mukhyam ।
śrī rāma dūtaṃ śirasā namāmi ॥

title: Chaupāī 1
original:
jaya hanumāna jñāna guṇa sāgara ।
jaya kapīśa tihu lōka ujāgara ॥ 1 ॥

title: Verse 2
original:
rāmadūta atulita baladhāmā ।
añjani putra pavanasuta nāmā ॥ 2 ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
mahāvīra vikrama bajaraṅgī ।
kumati nivāra sumati kē saṅgī ॥3 ॥

title: Verse 4
original:
kañchana varaṇa virāja suvēśā ।
kānana kuṇḍala kuñchita kēśā ॥ 4 ॥

title: Verse 5
original:
hāthavajra au dhvajā virājai । 
kānthē mūñja janēvū sājai ॥ 5॥

title: Verse 6
original:
śaṅkara suvana kēsarī nandana । 
tēja pratāpa mahājaga vandana ॥ 6 ॥

title: Verse 7
original:
vidyāvāna guṇī ati chātura ।
rāma kāja karivē kō ātura ॥ 7 ॥

title: Verse 8
original:
prabhu charitra sunivē kō rasiyā ।
rāmalakhana sītā mana basiyā ॥ 8॥

title: Verse 9
original:
sūkṣma rūpadhari siyahi dikhāvā ।
vikaṭa rūpadhari laṅka jalāvā ॥ 9 ॥

title: Verse 10
original:
bhīma rūpadhari asura saṃhārē ।
rāmachandra kē kāja saṃvārē ॥ 10 ॥

title: Verse 11
original:
lāya sañjīvana lakhana jiyāyē ।
śrī raghuvīra haraṣi uralāyē ॥ 11 ॥

title: Verse 12
original:
raghupati kīnhī bahuta baḍāyī (ī) ।
tuma mama priya bharata sama bhāyī ॥ 12 ॥
split_lines: tuma mama priya bharata sama bhāyī 12

title: Verse 13
original:
sahasra vadana tumharō yaśagāvai ।
asa kahi śrīpati kaṇṭha lagāvai ॥ 13 ॥

title: Verse 14
original:
sanakādika brahmādi munīśā ।
nārada śārada sahita ahīśā ॥ 14 ॥

title: Verse 15
original:
yama kubēra digapāla jahāṃ tē ।
kavi kōvida kahi sakē kahāṃ tē ॥ 15 ॥
split_lines: kavi kōvida kahi sakē kahāṃ tē 15

title: Verse 16
original:
tuma upakāra sugrīvahi kīnhā ।
rāma milāya rājapada dīnhā ॥ 16 ॥

title: Verse 17
original:
tumharō mantra vibhīṣaṇa mānā ।
laṅkēśvara bhayē saba jaga jānā ॥ 17 ॥

title: Verse 18
original:
yuga sahasra yōjana para bhānū ।
līlyō tāhi madhura phala jānū ॥ 18 ॥

title: Verse 19
original:
prabhu mudrikā mēli mukha māhī ।
jaladhi lāṅghi gayē acharaja nāhī ॥ 19 ॥

title: Verse 20
original:
durgama kāja jagata kē jētē ।
sugama anugraha tumharē tētē ॥ 20 ॥

title: Verse 21
original:
rāma duārē tuma rakhavārē ।
hōta na ājñā binu paisārē ॥ 21 ॥

title: Verse 22
original:
saba sukha lahai tumhārī śaraṇā ।
tuma rakṣaka kāhū kō ḍara nā ॥ 22 ॥
split_lines: tuma rakṣaka kāhū kō ḍara nā 22

title: Verse 23
original:
āpana tēja samhārō āpai ।
tīnōṃ lōka hāṅka tē kāmpai ॥ 23 ॥

title: Verse 24
original:
bhūta piśācha nikaṭa nahi āvai ।
mahavīra jaba nāma sunāvai ॥ 24 ॥

title: Verse 25
original:
nāsai rōga harai saba pīrā ।
japata nirantara hanumata vīrā ॥ 25 ॥

title: Verse 26
original:
saṅkaṭa sē hanumāna Chuḍāvai ।
mana krama vachana dhyāna jō lāvai ॥ 26 ॥
split_lines: mana krama vachana dhyāna jō lāvai 26

title: Verse 27
original:
saba para rāma tapasvī rājā ।
tinakē kāja sakala tuma sājā ॥ 27 ॥

title: Verse 28
original:
aura manōratha jō kōyi lāvai ।
tāsu amita jīvana phala pāvai ॥ 28 ॥

title: Verse 29
original:
chārō yuga pratāpa tumhārā ।
hai parasiddha jagata ujiyārā ॥ 29 ॥

title: Verse 30
original:
sādhu santa kē tuma rakhavārē ।
asura nikandana rāma dulārē ॥ 30 ॥

title: Verse 31
original:
aṣṭhasiddhi nava nidhi kē dātā ।
asa vara dīnha jānakī mātā ॥ 31 ॥

title: Verse 32
original:
rāma rasāyana tumhārē pāsā ।
sadā rahō raghupati kē dāsā ॥ 32 ॥

title: Verse 33
original:
tumharē bhajana rāmakō pāvai ।
janma janma kē dukha bisarāvai ॥ 33 ॥

title: Verse 34
original:
anta kāla raghupati purajāyī । 
jahāṃ janma haribhakta kahāyī ॥ 34 ॥

title: Verse 35
original:
aura dēvatā chitta na dharayī ।
hanumata sēyi sarva sukha karayī ॥ 35 ॥

title: Verse 36
original:
saṅkaṭa ka(ha)ṭai miṭai saba pīrā ।
jō sumirai hanumata bala vīrā ॥ 36 ॥

title: Verse 37
original:
jai jai jai hanumāna gōsāyī ।
kṛpā karahu gurudēva kī nāyī ॥ 37 ॥

title: Verse 38
original:
yaha śata vāra pāṭha kara kōyī । 
Chūṭahi bandi mahā sukha hōyī ॥ 38 ॥
split_lines: yaha śata vāra pāṭha kara kōyī

title: Verse 39
original:
jō yaha paḍai hanumāna chālīsā ।
hōya siddhi sākhī gaurīśā ॥ 39 ॥

title: Verse 40
original:
tulasīdāsa sadā hari chērā ।
kījai nātha hṛdaya maha ḍērā ॥ 40 ॥

title: Dōhā 45
original:
pavana tanaya saṅkaṭa haraṇa -  maṅgaḻa mūrati rūp ।
rāma lakhana sītā sahita - hṛdaya basahu surabhūp ॥
siyāvara rāmachandrakī jaya । pavanasuta hanumānakī jaya । bōlō bhāyī saba santanakī jaya ।
split_lines: pavana tanaya saṅkaṭa haraṇa -  maṅgaḻa mūrati rūp
rāma lakhana sītā sahita - hṛdaya basahu surabhūp
siyāvara rāmachandrakī jaya pavanasuta hanumānakī jaya bōlō bhāyī saba santanakī jaya

title: Verse 1
original:
nṛsiṃhakavachaṃ vakṣyē prahlādēnōditaṃ purā ।
sarvarakṣākaraṃ puṇyaṃ sarvōpadravanāśanam ॥ 1 ॥

title: Verse 2
original:
sarvasampatkaraṃ chaiva svargamōkṣapradāyakam ।
dhyātvā nṛsiṃhaṃ dēvēśaṃ hēmasiṃhāsanasthitam ॥ 2 ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
vivṛtāsyaṃ trinayanaṃ śaradindusamaprabham ।
lakṣmyāliṅgitavāmāṅgaṃ vibhūtibhirupāśritam ॥ 3 ॥

title: Verse 4
original:
chaturbhujaṃ kōmalāṅgaṃ svarṇakuṇḍalaśōbhitam ।
sarōjaśōbhitōraskaṃ ratnakēyūramudritam ॥ 4 ॥

title: Verse 5
original:
taptakāñchanasaṅkāśaṃ pītanirmalavāsanam ।
indrādisuramauḻisthasphuranmāṇikyadīptibhiḥ ॥ 5 ॥

title: Verse 6
original:
virājitapadadvandvaṃ śaṅkhachakrādihētibhiḥ ।
garutmatā savinayaṃ stūyamānaṃ mudānvitam ॥ 6 ॥

title: Verse 7
original:
svahṛtkamalasaṃvāsaṃ kṛtvā tu kavachaṃ paṭhēt ।
nṛsiṃhō mē śiraḥ pātu lōkarakṣātmasambhavaḥ ॥ 7 ॥

title: Verse 8
original:
sarvagō'pi stambhavāsaḥ phālaṃ mē rakṣatu dhvanim ।
nṛsiṃhō mē dṛśau pātu sōmasūryāgnilōchanaḥ ॥ 8 ॥
split_lines: sarvagō'pi stambhavāsaḥ phālaṃ mē rakṣatu dhvanim

title: Verse 9
original:
smṛtiṃ mē pātu nṛharirmunivaryastutipriyaḥ ।
nāsāṃ mē siṃhanāsastu mukhaṃ lakṣmīmukhapriyaḥ ॥ 9 ॥

title: Verse 10
original:
sarvavidyādhipaḥ pātu nṛsiṃhō rasanāṃ mama ।
vaktraṃ pātvinduvadanaḥ sadā prahlādavanditaḥ ॥ 10 ॥

title: Verse 11
original:
nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē kaṇṭhaṃ skandhau bhūbharaṇāntakṛt ।
divyāstraśōbhitabhujō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē bhujau ॥ 11 ॥
split_lines: nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu mē kaṇṭhaṃ skandhau bhūbharaṇāntakṛt

title: Verse 12
original:
karau mē dēvavaradō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu sarvataḥ ।
hṛdayaṃ yōgisādhyaścha nivāsaṃ pātu mē hariḥ ॥ 12 ॥
split_lines: karau mē dēvavaradō nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu sarvataḥ
hṛdayaṃ yōgisādhyaścha nivāsaṃ pātu mē hariḥ 12

title: Verse 13
original:
madhyaṃ pātu hiraṇyākṣavakṣaḥkukṣividāraṇaḥ ।
nābhiṃ mē pātu nṛhariḥ svanābhi brahmasaṃstutaḥ ॥ 13 ॥
split_lines: nābhiṃ mē pātu nṛhariḥ svanābhi brahmasaṃstutaḥ 13

title: Verse 14
original:
brahmāṇḍakōṭayaḥ kaṭyāṃ yasyāsau pātu mē kaṭim ।
guhyaṃ mē pātu guhyānāṃ mantrāṇāṃ guhyarūpadhṛk ॥ 14 ॥
split_lines: brahmāṇḍakōṭayaḥ kaṭyāṃ yasyāsau pātu mē kaṭim
guhyaṃ mē pātu guhyānāṃ mantrāṇāṃ guhyarūpadhṛk 14

title: Verse 15
original:
ūrū manōbhavaḥ pātu jānunī nararūpadhṛk ।
jaṅghē pātu dharābhārahartā yō'sau nṛkēsarī ॥ 15 ॥

title: Verse 16
original:
surarājyapradaḥ pātu pādau mē nṛharīśvaraḥ ।
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ pātu mē sarvaśastanum ॥ 16 ॥

title: Verse 17
original:
mahōgraḥ pūrvataḥ pātu mahāvīrāgrajō'gnitaḥ ।
mahāviṣṇurdakṣiṇē tu mahājvālastu nairṛtau ॥ 17 ॥

title: Verse 18
original:
paśchimē pātu sarvēśō diśi mē sarvatōmukhaḥ ।
nṛsiṃhaḥ pātu vāyavyāṃ saumyāṃ bhūṣaṇavigrahaḥ ॥ 18 ॥
split_lines: paśchimē pātu sarvēśō diśi mē sarvatōmukhaḥ

title: Verse 19
original:
īśānyāṃ pātu bhadrō mē sarvamaṅgaḻadāyakaḥ ।
saṃsārabhayadaḥ pātu mṛtyōrmṛtyurnṛkēsarī ॥ 19 ॥

title: Verse 20
original:
idaṃ nṛsiṃhakavachaṃ prahlādamukhamaṇḍitam ।
bhaktimānyaḥ paṭhēnnityaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramuchyatē ॥ 20 ॥

title: Verse 21
original:
putravān dhanavān lōkē dīrghāyurupajāyatē ।
yaṃ yaṃ kāmayatē kāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpnōtyasaṃśayam ॥ 21 ॥
split_lines: yaṃ yaṃ kāmayatē kāmaṃ taṃ taṃ prāpnōtyasaṃśayam 21

title: Verse 22
original:
sarvatra jayamāpnōti sarvatra vijayī bhavēt ।
bhūmyantarikṣadivyānāṃ grahāṇāṃ vinivāraṇam ॥ 22 ॥

title: Verse 23
original:
vṛśchikōragasambhūtaviṣāpaharaṇaṃ param ।
brahmarākṣasayakṣāṇāṃ dūrōtsāraṇakāraṇam ॥ 23 ॥

title: Verse 24
original:
bhūrjē vā tāḻapatrē vā kavachaṃ likhitaṃ śubham ।
karamūlē dhṛtaṃ yēna sidhyēyuḥ karmasiddhayaḥ ॥ 24 ॥
split_lines: bhūrjē vā tāḻapatrē vā kavachaṃ likhitaṃ śubham

title: Verse 25
original:
dēvāsuramanuṣyēṣu svaṃ svamēva jayaṃ labhēt ।
ēkasandhyaṃ trisandhyaṃ vā yaḥ paṭhēnniyatō naraḥ ॥ 25 ॥
split_lines: ēkasandhyaṃ trisandhyaṃ vā yaḥ paṭhēnniyatō naraḥ 25

title: Verse 26
original:
sarvamaṅgaḻamāṅgaḻyaṃ bhuktiṃ muktiṃ cha vindati ।
dvātriṃśatisahasrāṇi paṭhēchChuddhātmanāṃ nṛṇām ॥ 26 ॥

title: Verse 27
original:
kavachasyāsya mantrasya mantrasiddhiḥ prajāyatē ।
anēna mantrarājēna kṛtvā bhasmābhimantraṇam ॥ 27 ॥

title: Verse 28
original:
tilakaṃ vinyasēdyastu tasya grahabhayaṃ harēt ।
trivāraṃ japamānastu dattaṃ vāryabhimantrya cha ॥ 28 ॥

title: Verse 29
original:
prāśayēdyō narō mantraṃ nṛsiṃhadhyānamācharēt ।
tasya rōgāḥ praṇaśyanti yē cha syuḥ kukṣisambhavāḥ ॥ 29 ॥
split_lines: tasya rōgāḥ praṇaśyanti yē cha syuḥ kukṣisambhavāḥ 29

title: Verse 30
original:
kimatra bahunōktēna nṛsiṃhasadṛśō bhavēt ।
manasā chintitaṃ yattu sa tachchāpnōtyasaṃśayam ॥ 30 ॥

title: Verse 31
original:
garjantaṃ garjayantaṃ nijabhujapaṭalaṃ sphōṭayantaṃ haṭhantaṃ
rūpyantaṃ tāpayantaṃ divi bhuvi ditijaṃ kṣēpayantaṃ kṣipantam ।
krandantaṃ rōṣayantaṃ diśi diśi satataṃ saṃharantaṃ bharantaṃ
vīkṣantaṃ ghūrṇayantaṃ śaranikaraśatairdivyasiṃhaṃ namāmi ॥
split_lines: rūpyantaṃ tāpayantaṃ divi bhuvi ditijaṃ kṣēpayantaṃ kṣipantam
krandantaṃ rōṣayantaṃ diśi diśi satataṃ saṃharantaṃ bharantaṃ

title: Verse 32
original: iti śrībrahmāṇḍapurāṇē prahlādōktaṃ śrī nṛsiṃha kavacham ।
split_lines: iti śrībrahmāṇḍapurāṇē prahlādōktaṃ śrī nṛsiṃha kavacham

title: Verse 1
original:
dēvō naḥ śubhamātanōtu daśadhā nirvartayan bhūmikāṁ raṅgē dhāmani labdhanirbhararasairadhyakṣitō bhāvukaiḥ
yadbhāvēṣu pr̥thagvidhēṣvanuguṇān bhāvān svayaṁ bibhratī yaddharmairiha dharmiṇī viharatē nānākr̥tirnāyikā
split_lines: dēvō naḥ śubhamātanōtu daśadhā nirvartayan bhūmikāṁ raṅgē dhāmani labdhanirbhararasairadhyakṣitō bhāvukaiḥ
yadbhāvēṣu pr̥thagvidhēṣvanuguṇān bhāvān svayaṁ bibhratī yaddharmairiha dharmiṇī viharatē nānākr̥tirnāyikā

title: Verse 2
original:
nirmagnaśrutijālamārgaṇadaśādattakṣaṇairvīkṣaṇai- -rantastanvadivāravindamahanānyaudanvatīnāmapām
niṣpratyūhataraṅgariṅgaṇamithaḥ pratyūḍhapāthaśchaṭā- -ḍōlārōhasadōhalaṁ bhagavatō mātsyaṁ vapuḥ pātu naḥ
split_lines: niṣpratyūhataraṅgariṅgaṇamithaḥ pratyūḍhapāthaśchaṭā- -ḍōlārōhasadōhalaṁ bhagavatō mātsyaṁ vapuḥ pātu naḥ

title: Verse 3

original: akhilahēyapratyanīka kalyāṇaikatāna | svētara samastavastuvilakṣaṇānanta jñānānandaikasvarūpa | svābhimatānurūpaikarūpācintya divyādbhuta nityaniravadya niratiśayaujjvalya saundarya saugandhya saukumārya lāvaṇya yauvanādyanantaguṇanidhi divyarūpa | svābhāvikānavadhikātiśaya jñāna balaiśvarya vīrya śakti tējassauśīlya vātsalya mārdavārjava sauhārda sāmya kāruṇya mādhurya gāmbhīryaudārya cāturya sthairya dhairya śaurya parākrama satyakāma satyasaṅkalpa kr̥titva kr̥tajñatādyasaṅkhyēya kalyāṇaguṇagaṇaugha mahārṇava | svōcita vividha vicitrānantāścarya nitya niravadya niratiśaya sugandha niratiśaya sukhasparśa niratiśayaujjvalya kirīṭa makuṭa cūḍāvataṁsa makarakuṇḍala graivēyaka hāra kēyūra kaṭaka śrīvatsa kaustubha muktādāmōdarabandhana pītāmbara kāñcīguṇa nūpurādyaparimita divyabhūṣaṇa | svānurūpācintyaśakti śaṅkhacakragadā:’si śārṅgādyasaṅkhyēya nityaniravadya niratiśaya kalyāṇadivyāyudha | svābhimata nityaniravadyānurūpa svarūparūpaguṇa vibhavaiśvarya śīlādyanavadhikātiśayāsaṅkhyēya kalyāṇaguṇagaṇaśrīvallabha ēvambhūta bhūminīlānāyaka | svacchandānuvarti svarūpasthiti pravr̥ttibhēdāśēṣa śēṣataikaratirūpa nityaniravadyaniratiśaya jñāna kriyaiśvaryādyananta kalyāṇaguṇagaṇa śēṣa śēṣāśana garuḍapramukha nānāvidhānanta parijana paricārikā paricarita caraṇayugala | paramayōgi vāṅmanasā:’paricchēdya svarūpa svabhāva svābhimata vividhavicitrānantabhōgya bhōgōpakaraṇa bhōgasthāna samr̥ddhānantāścaryānanta mahāvibhavānanta parimāṇa nitya niravadya niratiśaya śrīvaikuṇṭhanātha | svasaṅkalpānuvidhāyi svarūpasthiti pravr̥ttisvaśēṣataikasvabhāva prakr̥ti puruṣa kālātmaka vividha vicitrānanta bhōgya bhōktr̥varga bhōgōpakaraṇa bhōgasthānarūpa nikhilajagadudaya vibhava layalīla | satyakāma satyasaṅkalpa parabrahmabhūta puruṣōttama mahāvibhūtē
split_lines: svābhimatānurūpaikarūpācintya divyādbhuta nityaniravadya niratiśayaujjvalya saundarya saugandhya saukumārya lāvaṇya yauvanādyanantaguṇanidhi divyarūpa

svābhāvikānavadhikātiśaya jñāna balaiśvarya vīrya śakti tējassauśīlya vātsalya mārdavārjava sauhārda sāmya kāruṇya mādhurya gāmbhīryaudārya cāturya sthairya dhairya śaurya parākrama satyakāma satyasaṅkalpa kr̥titva kr̥tajñatādyasaṅkhyēya kalyāṇaguṇagaṇaugha mahārṇava

svōcita vividha vicitrānantāścarya nitya niravadya niratiśaya sugandha niratiśaya sukhasparśa niratiśayaujjvalya kirīṭa makuṭa cūḍāvataṁsa makarakuṇḍala graivēyaka hāra kēyūra kaṭaka śrīvatsa kaustubha muktādāmōdarabandhana pītāmbara kāñcīguṇa nūpurādyaparimita divyabhūṣaṇa
svānurūpācintyaśakti śaṅkhacakragadā:’si śārṅgādyasaṅkhyēya nityaniravadya niratiśaya kalyāṇadivyāyudha
svābhimata nityaniravadyānurūpa svarūparūpaguṇa vibhavaiśvarya śīlādyanavadhikātiśayāsaṅkhyēya kalyāṇaguṇagaṇaśrīvallabha ēvambhūta bhūminīlānāyaka

svacchandānuvarti svarūpasthiti pravr̥ttibhēdāśēṣa śēṣataikaratirūpa nityaniravadyaniratiśaya jñāna kriyaiśvaryādyananta kalyāṇaguṇagaṇa śēṣa śēṣāśana garuḍapramukha nānāvidhānanta parijana paricārikā paricarita caraṇayugala

paramayōgi vāṅmanasā:’paricchēdya svarūpa svabhāva svābhimata vividhavicitrānantabhōgya bhōgōpakaraṇa bhōgasthāna samr̥ddhānantāścaryānanta mahāvibhavānanta parimāṇa nitya niravadya niratiśaya śrīvaikuṇṭhanātha
svasaṅkalpānuvidhāyi svarūpasthiti pravr̥ttisvaśēṣataikasvabhāva prakr̥ti puruṣa kālātmaka vividha vicitrānanta bhōgya bhōktr̥varga bhōgōpakaraṇa bhōgasthānarūpa nikhilajagadudaya vibhava layalīla

title: Verse 2
original: śrīman nārāyaṇa vaikuṇṭhanātha | apāra kāruṇya sauśīlya vātsalyaudāryaiśvarya saundarya mahōdadhē | anālōcitaviśēṣāśēṣalōka śaraṇya praṇatārtihara | āśrita vātsalyaikajaladhē | anavaratavidita nikhilabhūtajātayāthātmya | aśēṣacarācarabhūta nikhilaniyamana nirata | aśēṣacidacidvastu śēṣibhūta nikhilajagadādhāra | akhilajagatsvāmin asmatsvāmin | satyakāma satyasaṅkalpa sakalētaravilakṣaṇa arthikalpaka āpatsakha | śrīman nārāyaṇa aśaraṇyaśaraṇya | ananyaśaraṇastvatpādāravinda yugalaṁ śaraṇamahaṁ prapadyē
split_lines: apāra kāruṇya sauśīlya vātsalyaudāryaiśvarya saundarya mahōdadhē

original:

title: Verse 1
original:
bha̠dra-ṅkarṇēbhi-śśṛṇu̠yāma dēvāḥ ।
bha̠dra-mpaśyēmā̠kṣabhi̠ryajatrāḥ ।
sthi̠rairaṅgaistuṣṭu̠vāgṃsasta̠nūbhiḥ ।
vyaśēma dē̠vahita̠ṃ yadāyuḥ ॥
sva̠sti na̠ indrō vṛ̠ddhaśravāḥ ।
svasti naḥ pū̠ṣā vi̠śvavēdāḥ ।
sva̠̠stina̠stārkṣyō̠ ariṣṭanēmiḥ ।
sva̠sti nō̠ bṛha̠spatirdadhātu ॥
ōṃ śānti̠-śśānti̠-śśāntiḥ ॥

title: Verse 2
original:
yō-'pā-mpuṣpa̠ṃ vēda ।
puṣpavā-npra̠jāvā-npaśu̠mā-nbhavati ।
cha̠ndramā̠ vā a̠pā-mpuṣpam ।
puṣpavā-npra̠jāvā-npaśu̠mā-nbhavati ।
ya ē̠vaṃ vēda ।
yō-'pāmā̠yatana̠ṃ vēda ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ॥

title: Verse 3
original:
a̠gnirvā a̠pāmā̠yatanam ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
yō-'gnērā̠yatana̠ṃ vēda ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
āpō̠vā a̠gnērā̠yatanam ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
ya ē̠vaṃ vēda ।
yō-'pāmā̠yatana̠ṃ vēda ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ॥

original:

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
āpō̠ vai vā̠yōrā̠yatanam ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

yō-'pāmā̠yatana̠ṃ vēda ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ॥

title: Verse 5
original:
a̠sau vai tapanna̠pāmā̠yatanam ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
yō-'muṣya̠tapata ā̠yatana̠ṃ vēda ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ॥

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

original:

title: Verse 9
original:
sa̠ṃva̠tsa̠rō vā a̠pāmā̠yatana̠m ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।

ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
āpō̠ vai saṃvatsa̠rasyā̠yatanam ।
ā̠yatanavā-nbhavati ।
ya ēvaṃ vēda ।
yō-'phsu nāva̠-mpratiṣṭhitā̠ṃ vēda ।

title: Verse 10
original:
ōṃ rā̠jā̠dhi̠rā̠jāya prasahya sā̠hinē ।
namō va̠yaṃ vaiśrava̠ṇāya kurmahē ।
sa mē̠ kāmā̠n kāma̠ kāmāya̠ mahyam ।
kā̠mē̠śva̠rō vaiśrava̠ṇō dadātu ।
ku̠bē̠rāya vaiśrava̠ṇāya ।
ma̠hā̠rājāya̠ namaḥ ॥
split_lines: sa mē̠ kāmā̠n kāma̠ kāmāya̠ mahyam

title: Verse 11
original:
ō-ntadbra̠hma ।
ō-ntadvā̠yuḥ ।
ō-ntadā̠tmā ।
ō-ntathsa̠tyam ।
ō-ntatsarvam ।
ō-ntatpurō̠rnamaḥ ॥

title: Verse 12
original:
antaścharati bhūtē̠ṣu guhāyāṃ viśvamū̠rtiṣu ।
tvaṃ yajñastvaṃ vaṣaṭkārastva-mindrastvagṃ
rudrastvaṃ viṣṇustva-mbrahmatva-mprajā̠patiḥ ।
tva-ntadāpa̠ āpō̠ jyōtī̠rasō̠-'mṛta-mbrahma̠ bhūrbhuva̠ssuva̠rōm ।

title: Verse 13
original:
īśānassarva vidyā̠nāmīśvarassarvabhūtā̠nāṃ
brahmādhipati̠-rbrahma̠ṇō-'dhipati̠-rbrahmā śi̠vō mē astu sadāśi̠vōm ।

title: Verse 14
original:
tadviṣṇōḥ para̠ma-mpa̠dagṃ sadā paśyanti sū̠rayaḥ ।
di̠vīva̠ chakṣu̠rātatam ।
tadviprāsō vipa̠nyavō jāgṛ̠vāgṃ sassamindhatē ।
viṣnō̠ryatpara̠ma-mpa̠dam ।

title: Verse 15
original:
ṛtagṃ sa̠tya-mpara-mbra̠hma̠ pu̠ruṣa-ṅkṛṣṇa̠piṅgalam ।
ū̠rdhvarētaṃ virūpā̠kṣa̠ṃ vi̠śvarūpāya̠ vai namō̠ namaḥ ॥
split_lines: ū̠rdhvarētaṃ virūpā̠kṣa̠ṃ vi̠śvarūpāya̠ vai namō̠ namaḥ

title: Verse 16
original:
ō-nnā̠rā̠ya̠ṇāya vi̠dmahē vāsudē̠vāya dhīmahi ।
tannō viṣṇuḥ prachō̠dayāt ॥

title: Verse 17
original: ōṃ śānti̠-śśānti̠-śśāntiḥ ।
